public_claim_patterns: \bOperator review has authorized production threshold transition\b
product_language_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under explicit Operator authorization evidence.

fail_closed_behavior: Fail validation if the Palisade policy bundle, consumer contract, policy file, input schema, or decision schema is missing or malformed.
Fail validation if any consumed claim class lacks a Palisade claim ID mapping.
Fail validation if a Palisade-governed public claim appears and the current repository evidence decision is not allow.
Fail validation if decision output is malformed or allowed conflicts with the decision.
no_overclaim_behavior: Validator consumption is not runtime enforcement.
Policy test fixtures are not current repository evidence.

Current public language must not claim production workspace maturity, public NEXUS runtime, model API execution, operational release authority, runtime enforcement, or deployed Palisade maturity without Palisade allow under current evidence.

operator_review_handling.requires_operator_review: Not public claim permission by itself.
operator_review_handling.authorization_required: Explicit Operator authorization evidence must be present before the validator treats an Operator-review-gated claim as allowed.

runtime_enforcement_status_handling.unavailable: Confirms validator-only consumption and must not be represented as deployed enforcement.
runtime_enforcement_status_handling.available: May only be accepted when current repository evidence proves the governed runtime path and runtime enforcement authorization.

non_claims: This consumer contract does not implement runtime enforcement.
This consumer contract does not wire Palisade into public runtime behavior.
This consumer contract does not modify public copy or README prose.
This consumer contract does not implement Conduit execution, Vault/NEXUS execution, model API execution, Weave orchestration, or operational release authority.
next_integration_boundary: After product-language validator consumption is validated, a separately authorized pass may extend the same policy-consumption adapter to README current-state truth or operational-evidence contract validation without runtime enforcement.
